a.invisible: state == 'new' and not is_completed or type_external_id not in ['l10n_es_reports_2025.es_mod130_tax_return_type', 'l10n_es_reports_2025.es_mod347_tax_return_type', 'l10n_es_reports_2025.es_mod349_tax_return_type', 'l10n_es_reports_2025.es_mod390_tax_return_type']
a.name: action_reset_2_states
